news_app.management.commands package

Submodules

news_app.management.commands.setup_groups module

class news_app.management.commands.setup_groups.Command(stdout=None, stderr=None, no_color=False, force_color=False)

Bases: BaseCommand

Custom management command to create user groups and assign permissions.

Run with: python manage.py setup_groups

assign_permissions(group, codenames)

Assigns permissions to a group by codename.

handle(*args, **kwargs)

Main function that runs when command is called.

help = 'Creates user groups and assigns permissions'
